title: ilex vomitoria subsp. chiapensis
intro: Ilex vomitoria subsp. chiapensis, also known as Chiapas holly, is a subspecies of the American holly plant native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex vomitoria subsp. chiapensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
